allow: Bash(python -c "from google.adk.agents import LlmAgent; print\('LlmAgent ok'\)")
Bash(python -c "from google.adk.tools.mcp_tool.mcp_toolset import McpToolset, SseServerParams; print\('McpToolset ok'\)")

Bash(python -c " from google.adk.tools.mcp_tool.mcp_toolset import McpToolset, SseConnectionParams, StdioConnectionParams from google.adk.agents import LlmAgent from google.adk.tools import FunctionTool import inspect sig = inspect.signature\(LlmAgent.__init__\) print\('LlmAgent params:', list\(sig.parameters.keys\(\)\)\) ")

Bash(python -c " from google.adk.agents import LlmAgent a = LlmAgent\(name='test', model='gemini-2.0-flash', instruction='test', output_key='foo'\) print\('name:', a.name\) print\('output_key:', a.output_key\) print\('model:', a.model\) ")
Bash(python -c " from google.adk.tools import FunctionTool import inspect print\(inspect.signature\(FunctionTool.__init__\)\) ")

Bash(python -c " from google.adk.tools.mcp_tool.mcp_toolset import McpToolset, SseConnectionParams import inspect sig = inspect.signature\(McpToolset.__init__\) print\('McpToolset params:', list\(sig.parameters.keys\(\)\)\) ")

Bash(python -c " from google.adk.agents import SequentialAgent, ParallelAgent import inspect print\('SequentialAgent params:', list\(inspect.signature\(SequentialAgent.__init__\).parameters.keys\(\)\)\) print\('ParallelAgent params:', list\(inspect.signature\(ParallelAgent.__init__\).parameters.keys\(\)\)\) ")

Bash(python -c " import pkgutil, google.adk for imp, name, ispkg in pkgutil.walk_packages\(google.adk.__path__, google.adk.__name__+'.'\): if 'a2a' in name.lower\(\) and \('to_a2a' in name.lower\(\) or 'server' in name.lower\(\) or 'app' in name.lower\(\)\): print\(name\) ")
Bash(python -c " from google.adk.a2a.utils.agent_to_a2a import to_a2a import inspect print\(inspect.signature\(to_a2a\)\) ")
